title: Web Development Foundations
description: Start from zero and build your first portfolio site. Learn the terminal, Git, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive design through hands-on projects in every module.

modules.title: Terminal & Command Line Basics
modules.project: Terminal Treasure Hunt — navigate a filesystem to find hidden files

modules.title: How the Web Works
modules.project: Request Inspector — trace a web request from browser to server and back

modules.title: Git & GitHub
modules.project: Collaboration Sim — fork, branch, and merge a shared repo

modules.title: HTML Fundamentals
modules.project: Recipe Page — build a semantic, accessible recipe site

modules.title: CSS Fundamentals
modules.project: Style a Landing Page — transform plain HTML into a polished design

modules.title: CSS Layout: Flexbox & Grid
modules.project: Photo Gallery — build a responsive image gallery with Flexbox and Grid

modules.title: Responsive Web Design
modules.project: Mobile-First Blog — redesign a desktop layout for all screen sizes

modules.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
modules.project: Quiz App — build an interactive quiz with scoring and feedback

modules.title: JavaScript & the DOM
modules.project: Task Manager — build a dynamic to-do list with DOM manipulation

modules.title: Capstone: Build Your Portfolio Site
modules.project: Personal Portfolio — your capstone portfolio site deployed to the web

author: We Build Black
